task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'New Member Welcome Routine'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a workout routine named 'New Member Welcome Routine' with the description 'Standard 4-week introductory program for all new Iron Peak Fitness members' in the routines list or routine detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify that three training days have been added to the new routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three training days listed under the 'New Member Welcome Routine', with at least one partially or fully visible starting with 'Full'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface of the WGER web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WGER interface, rather than a terminal window executing scripts, API calls, or direct database commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual WGER application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard WGER fitness manager UI at http://localhost, not a text editor or a static HTML mock-up.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to manipulate the DOM text to show the required names or routines.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task explicitly requires multi-module navigation within the WGER web application to perform user_registration, routine_creation, and training_day_creation. The agent must roleplay as the Fitness Center Manager of Iron Peak Fitness.
